raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I am seeking your assistance with a dispute involving XXXX XXXX and American Express. Here are the details of my case : Reservation and Cancellation : I made a reservation with XXXX XXXX for an event scheduled for XX/XX/year>. I later rescheduled the event to XX/XX/year>. In XX/XX/year>, I decided to cancel the reservation, doing so 30 days before the event as permitted by our contract. 

Contract Terms : According to the contract I signed, the cancellation policy allows for cancellations up to 30 days before the event. It also specifies that cancellations can not be made via voicemail but must be communicated by other means. 

Attempted Cancellation : I attempted to contact XXXX XXXX  by phone to cancel the reservation but was unable to reach anyone. Given the lack of response, I sent an email to cancel the event, as no other contact method was available. 

Vendors Actions : Despite my attempts to follow the cancellation procedure, XXXX XXXX ignored my request and charged me for the event. I made further attempts to resolve the issue by contacting them via phone and email, but they did not respond. 

Dispute with American Express : Due to the unauthorized charge, I filed a dispute with American Express, providing a copy of the signed contract as evidence. However, XXXX XXXX responded to the dispute with a falsified version of the contract, showing different cancellation terms and stating that cancellations must be made in person or through direct staff contact. 

XXXX  XXXX : Despite providing American Express with the original signed contract and other supporting evidence against the vendors falsified documents, American Express ruled in favor of XXXX XXXX. 

Given the discrepancies in the contract and the vendors refusal to respond, I am seeking your assistance in resolving this matter. I believe that both XXXX XXXX  actions and American Expresss handling of the dispute are unfair and unjust. Your intervention would be greatly appreciated to help address this issue and ensure a fair resolution. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter. Please let me know if you require any additional information or documentation.
